name: ASRock Z890I NOVA WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9866+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - Optical SPDIF Out - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7
shortName: ASRock Z890I NOVA WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Mini-ITX Z890 motherboard with DDR5 support, dual Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 7 for ultra-compact builds.
